title: Evengard | Original Fantasy Music Resource Pack
description: After the great success of the Evengard music, they finally arrive on your favorite game!
body:
![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ead00d6137de53341ebde1e571bf4e0294965c56_0.webp)![info2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5f9c5e339feb68ab8c0b3760e29d9a96d49e7e1_0.webp)![info3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bfd06af723d2a8f920a2ec479e33ae4a098a40e_0.webp)![info4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fcb0688507adefec1174191aab3ea8403408a8f_0.webp)!

**In this Resource Pack you will have a new musical experience never seen before. Many original musical themes will be waiting for you in every situation in your vanilla or not. Evengard is the fantastic musical tale created by Marco Cutini starting from 2018. Live a new musical experience, inside your favorite game, with Evengard.**
